calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-17-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. JUdge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Vanessa Ran-Yi Guan was sworn and examined. The court grants decree changing petitioner's name to Vanessa Run-Yi Zhu. Decree signed in open court.
